eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Shiawassee, MI; at 07:12 PM ON MAR 3, 2026 Effective until 08:12 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: MSP Flint Post.Emergency in the Woods and Fields Community. A barricaded gunman has been reported in the area. Shelter in place immediately: go indoors, stay away from windows, lock doors, and remain alert. Avoid the area so responders can work. Updates will follow when the situation changes.
